info.name: SEC-API.io
info.description:
Comprehensive Postman collection for the SEC-API.io platform. Covers all SEC EDGAR filing search, download, and structured data APIs.

## Getting Started
1. Set the `SEC_API_KEY` variable to your API key from https://sec-api.io
2. All requests use the Authorization header automatically
3. Example values are pre-populated for immediate testing

## Authentication
All requests inherit the collection-level `Authorization: {{SEC_API_KEY}}` header. Bulk download endpoints also include `?token={{SEC_API_KEY}}` as a query parameter fallback.

item.name: EDGAR Filing Search & Download

request.description:
Search SEC EDGAR filings using Lucene query syntax. Supports filtering by form type, ticker, CIK, date ranges, and more.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression (max 3500 chars)

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order, e.g. [{"filedAt": {"order": "desc"}}]

**Example Queries:**
- `formType:"10-K" AND ticker:AAPL` - Apple 10-K filings
- `formType:"8-K" AND filedAt:[2024-01-01 TO 2024-12-31]` - All 8-K filings in 2024
- `cik:320193` - All filings by CIK

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/query-api

Full-text search across the content of SEC filings. Returns filings containing the search term with highlighted excerpts.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Search term or phrase. Use quotes for exact match.

**Optional Parameters:**
- `formTypes` (array): Filter by form types, e.g. ["10-K", "8-K"]
- `startDate` (string): Start date in yyyy-mm-dd (default: 30 days ago)
- `endDate` (string): End date in yyyy-mm-dd (default: today)
- `ciks` (array): Restrict to specific CIKs
- `page` (string): Page number (100 results/page, default: 1, max results: 10000)

**Query Features:** Exact phrases ("quotes"), wildcards (*), Boolean (OR, NOT), hyphen exclusion

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/full-text-search-api

query.description: (Required, pick one) URL of the HTML filing. Auto-populated from Filing Query API.
(Alternative) SEC accession number. Auto-populated from Filing Query API.

request.description:
Convert XBRL financial data from SEC filings into structured JSON. Provide one of htm-url, xbrl-url, or accession-no.

**Parameters (one required):**
- `htm-url` (string): Filing URL (htm/html) from sec.gov
- `xbrl-url` (string): Direct XBRL XML file URL
- `accession-no` (string): SEC accession number

**Response:** JSON with financial statements (StatementsOfIncome, BalanceSheets, StatementsOfCashFlows, etc.)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/xbrl-to-json-converter-api

Download any SEC filing document from the EDGAR archive mirror.

**Path Parameters:**
- `cik` (required): Filer's CIK without leading zeros (e.g. 1318605)
- `accession-number` (required): Numeric only, hyphens removed (e.g. 000156459021004599)
- `filename` (required): Document filename (any type: HTML, XML, TXT, PDF)

**Rate Limits:** Standard: 50 req/sec. Beta mirror (edgar-mirror.sec-api.io): 200 req/sec

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sec-filings-render-api

query.description: (Required) SEC filing URL. Auto-populated from Filing Query API.

request.description:
Convert an SEC filing into a downloadable PDF.

**Required Parameters:**
- `token` (string): API key
- `url` (string): SEC filing URL from sec.gov/Archives

**Response:** application/pdf

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sec-filings-render-api

query.description: (Required) SEC filing URL. Auto-populated from Filing Query API.
(Required) Section identifier. 10-K: 1, 1A, 1B, 1C, 2-15. 10-Q: part1item1-4, part2item1-6. 8-K: 1-1 through 9-1, signature

request.description:
Extract specific sections from 10-K, 10-Q, or 8-K filings.

**Required Parameters:**
- `token` (string): API key
- `url` (string): Filing URL
- `item` (string): Section identifier

**Optional Parameters:**
- `type` (string): 'text' (default) or 'html'

**10-K Sections:** 1, 1A, 1B, 1C, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 7A, 8, 9, 9A, 9B, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15
**10-Q Sections:** part1item1, part1item2, part1item3, part1item4, part2item1, part2item1a, part2item2, part2item3, part2item4, part2item5, part2item6
**8-K Sections:** 1-1 through 9-1, signature

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sec-filings-item-extraction-api

Get EDGAR filing ingestion logs for a specific date.

**Path Parameters:**
- `date` (required): Date in YYYY-MM-DD format

**Response:** JSON with lastUpdatedAt, total.value, and data array (accessionNo, formType, filedAt)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/query-api

item.description: Search SEC EDGAR filings, download documents, convert XBRL data, and extract filing sections.

item.name: Insider Trading & Ownership

request.description:
Search Form 3, 4, and 5 insider trading transactions.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Example Queries:**
- `issuer.tradingSymbol:TSLA` - Tesla insider trades
- `nonDerivativeTable.transactions.coding.code:P` - Open market purchases
- `reportingOwner.name:"Elon Musk"` - Specific insider

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/insider-ownership-trading-api

List available Form 4 bulk download files. Change path to form-3 or form-5 for other form types.

**Variants:**
- `/bulk/form-3/index.json`
- `/bulk/form-4/index.json`
- `/bulk/form-5/index.json`

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/insider-ownership-trading-api

Search Form 144 restricted stock sale notices. Dataset: 70,000+ filings since October 2022, updated within 300ms of EDGAR publication.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-144-api

Search Form 13F institutional holdings data.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** nameOfIssuer, cusip, ticker, cik, value, shrsOrPrnAmt, investmentDiscretion, votingAuthority

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-13f-api

Search Form 13F cover page data (filing manager info, total value, signature).

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** filingManager, crdNumber, periodOfReport, tableValueTotal, signature

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-13f-api

List available Form 13F holdings bulk download files.

**Variants:**
- `/bulk/form-13f/holdings/index.json`
- `/bulk/form-13f/cover-pages/index.json`

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-13f-api

Search Form 13D and 13G activist investor filings (beneficial ownership >5%).

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query with Boolean operators, range queries, wildcards

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** accessionNo, formType, filedAt, filer info, issuer details, owner/acquirer data

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-13d-13g-api

item.description: Search insider trading transactions (Forms 3, 4, 5), restricted stock sales (Form 144), institutional holdings (Form 13F), and activist investor filings (Form 13D/13G).

item.name: Investment Advisers (Form ADV)

request.description:
Search Form ADV investment adviser firm filings. Dataset: 41,000+ firms, updated daily 5:00-7:30 AM EST.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

Get Schedule A direct owners and executive officers for an investment adviser.

**Path Parameters:**
- `crd` (required): Firm CRD number. Example: 161222 (Bridgewater Associates)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

Get Schedule B indirect owners for an investment adviser.

**Path Parameters:**
- `crd` (required): Firm CRD number. Example: 161222 (Bridgewater Associates)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

item.name: Form ADV - Schedule D 1.B (Other Business Names)

request.description:
Get other business names used by an investment adviser.

**Path Parameters:**
- `crd` (required): Firm CRD number

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

Get separately managed account details including asset distributions, borrowings, derivatives, and custodians.

**Path Parameters:**
- `crd` (required): Firm CRD number

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

Get financial industry affiliations for an investment adviser.

**Path Parameters:**
- `crd` (required): Firm CRD number

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

Get private fund reporting details for an investment adviser.

**Path Parameters:**
- `crd` (required): Firm CRD number

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

Search individual investment adviser representatives. Dataset: 380,000+ individuals.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

Get Part 2 brochure submissions for an investment adviser.

**Path Parameters:**
- `crd` (required): Firm CRD number

**Response:** JSON with list of brochure submissions

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-adv-api

item.description: Search and retrieve Form ADV filings for investment adviser firms and individual representatives. Includes schedules for ownership, affiliations, managed accounts, and private funds.

item.name: Investment Companies

List available Form N-CEN bulk download files. Updated daily 1:00-4:00 AM ET.

item.name: Form N-PX - Voting Records by Accession

request.description:
Get detailed proxy voting records for a specific N-PX filing. Can return up to 500,000 voting records.

**Path Parameters:**
- `accession-number` (required): SEC accession number

**Response:** JSON with proxyVotingRecords array

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-npx-api

item.name: Form N-PORT - Mutual Fund Holdings Search

request.description:
Search Form N-PORT mutual fund portfolio holdings.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query with Boolean operators, wildcards, nested conditions

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 10, max: 10)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-nport-api

List available Form N-PORT bulk download files. Updated daily 1:00-4:00 AM ET.

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-nport-api

item.description: Access data for investment company filings: annual reports (N-CEN), proxy voting records (N-PX), and mutual fund portfolio holdings (N-PORT).

item.name: Public & Private Offerings

request.description:
Search Form S-1 and 424B4 IPO prospectus data.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query with Boolean operators, range queries, wildcards

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** tickers, securities, publicOfferingPrice, underwritingDiscount, proceedsBeforeExpenses, underwriters, lawFirms, auditors, management, employees

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-s1-424b4-api

Search Form C crowdfunding offering filings.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query with AND/OR operators

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** issuerInformation, offeringInformation, annualReportDisclosureRequirements, signatureInfo

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-c-api

Search Form D private securities offering filings.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** primaryIssuer, offeringData, submissionType

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-d-api

Search all Regulation A offering statements (Forms 1-A, 1-K, 1-Z).

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/reg-a-api

Search Regulation A Form 1-A offering statements.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/reg-a-api

Search Regulation A Form 1-K annual reports.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/reg-a-api

Search Regulation A Form 1-Z exit reports.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/reg-a-api

item.description: IPO prospectuses (Form S-1/424B4), crowdfunding offerings (Form C), private placements (Form D), and Regulation A offerings.

item.name: Form 8-K Structured Data

request.description:
Search Form 8-K Item 4.01 auditor change disclosures.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query targeting item401 fields

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Item 4.01 Fields:** newAccountantName, formerAccountantName, engagementEndReason, goingConcern, reportedIcfrWeakness, opinionType

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-8k-api

Search Form 8-K Item 4.02 financial restatement disclosures.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query targeting item402 fields

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Item 4.02 Fields:** keyComponents, identifiedIssues, affectedReportingPeriods, restatementIsNecessary, reasonsForRestatement, impactIsMaterial, materialWeaknessIdentified, netIncomeDecreased/Increased, revenueDecreased/Increased

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-8k-api

Search Form 8-K Item 5.02 director and officer change disclosures.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query targeting item502 fields

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Item 5.02 Fields:** personnelChanges, bonusPlans, organizationChanges, additionalReportableEvents

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/form-8k-api

item.description: Structured data extracted from Form 8-K current reports: auditor changes (Item 4.01), financial restatements (Item 4.02), and director/officer changes (Item 5.02).

item.name: Public Company Data

request.description:
Get historical executive compensation data by stock ticker.

**Path Parameters:**
- `ticker` (required): Stock ticker symbol (e.g. TSLA)

**Coverage:** 2005-present from Form DEF 14A

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/executive-compensation-api

Get historical executive compensation data by CIK number.

**Path Parameters:**
- `cik` (required): Central Index Key (e.g. 1318605 for Tesla)

**Coverage:** 2005-present from Form DEF 14A

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/executive-compensation-api

Search executive compensation data with custom queries.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Searchable Fields:** ticker, CIK, executive name, position, reportingYear, salary, bonus, stockAwards, optionAwards, incentiveCompensation, pensionChanges, otherCompensation, totalCompensation

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/executive-compensation-api

Search directors and board member data across 10,000+ companies.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** name, position, age, directorClass, dateFirstElected, isIndependent, committeeMemberships, qualificationsAndExperience

**Coverage:** 100,000+ directors, 2007-present, real-time updates

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/directors-and-board-members-api

query.description: (Required, one of ticker or cik) Stock ticker symbol

request.description:
Get outstanding shares and public float data.

**Parameters (one required):**
- `ticker` (string): Stock ticker symbol
- `cik` (string): Central Index Key

**Key Response Fields:** outstandingShares, publicFloat, periodOfReport, sourceFilingAccessionNo

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/outstanding-shares-api

Search company subsidiary data extracted from SEC filings.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query with Boolean operators, wildcards, nested conditions

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** subsidiaries array with name and jurisdiction for each subsidiary

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/subsidiaries-api

item.description: Executive compensation, directors and board members, outstanding shares and public float, and company subsidiaries.

item.name: Audit & Compliance

request.description:
Search audit fee disclosures from SEC filings.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/audit-fees-api

List available audit fees bulk download files.

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/audit-fees-api

Search financial statement audit reports.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/audit-reports-api

Search ICFR (Internal Controls over Financial Reporting) audit reports.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Fields:** materialWeaknessIdentified, icfrOpinionType, controlFramework

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/audit-reports-api

Download the full text content of an audit report by its ID.

**Path Parameters:**
- `report_id` (required): Report ID obtained from search results

**Response:** text/plain (full audit report content)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/audit-reports-api

item.description: Audit fees, financial statement audit reports, and internal controls over financial reporting (ICFR) audit data.

item.name: Enforcement Actions & SRO

request.description:
Search SEC enforcement actions.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query with field:value format and AND/OR operators

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order (default: releasedAt desc)

**Key Response Fields:** releaseNo, releasedAt, entities, penalties, violations

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sec-enforcement-actions-api

Search SEC litigation releases. Coverage: 10,000+ releases from 1995-present.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order (default: releasedAt desc)

**Key Response Fields:** releaseNo, releasedAt, url, title, summary, tags, entities, penaltyAmounts, violatedSections, hasAgreedToSettlement, hasAgreedToPayPenalty

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sec-litigation-releases-api

Search SEC administrative proceedings.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order (default: releasedAt desc)

**Key Response Fields:** releaseNo, fileNumbers, respondents, entities, title, summary, tags, complaints, violatedSections, orders, penaltyAmounts, requestedRelief

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sec-administrative-proceedings-api

Search Accounting and Auditing Enforcement Releases (AAERs).

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Key Response Fields:** aaerNo, releaseNumbers, dateTime, respondents, summary, tags, entities, complaints, penaltyAmounts, violatedSections, hasAgreedToSettlement

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/aaer-api

Download complete AAER metadata as a single JSON file.

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/aaer-api

Download all AAER documents for a given year as a ZIP archive.

**Path Parameters:**
- `year` (required): 4-digit year (e.g. 2024)

**Response:** Compressed ZIP with organized AAER folders containing PDFs and text files

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/aaer-api

Search Self-Regulatory Organization (SRO) filings.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (string): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (string): Results per page (default: 100, max: 100)
- `sort` (array): Sort order (default: issueDate desc)

**Key Response Fields:** releaseNumber, issueDate, fileNumber, sro, details, commentsDue, urls

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sro-api

Download complete SRO filings metadata from 1997-present as a single JSON file.

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sro-api

Download all SRO documents for a given year as a ZIP archive.

**Path Parameters:**
- `year` (required): 4-digit year (e.g. 2024)

**Response:** ZIP with organized folders containing PDFs, HTMLs, and text versions

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/sro-api

Download a single AAER document (PDF or text version).

**Path Parameters:**
- `aaerNo` (required): AAER number
- `filename` (required): Format: primary-{releaseNo}.pdf or primary-{releaseNo}.pdf.txt

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/aaer-api

item.description: SEC enforcement actions, litigation releases, administrative proceedings, accounting and auditing enforcement releases (AAER), and self-regulatory organization (SRO) filings.

item.name: Data Mapping

request.description:
Resolve a CIK to company details including ticker, name, exchange, sector, and industry.

**Path Parameters:**
- `cik` (required): Central Index Key without leading zeros. Example: 320193 (Apple)

**Response Fields:** name, ticker, cik, cusip, exchange, isDelisted, category, sector, industry, sic, currency, location

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/mapping-api

Resolve a stock ticker to company details.

**Path Parameters:**
- `ticker` (required): Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/mapping-api

Resolve a CUSIP to company details.

**Path Parameters:**
- `cusip` (required): CUSIP identifier (e.g. 037833100 for Apple)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/mapping-api

Search companies by name.

**Path Parameters:**
- `name` (required): Company name or partial name

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/mapping-api

List all companies on a specific exchange.

**Path Parameters:**
- `exchange` (required): Exchange code (e.g. NASDAQ, NYSE, AMEX)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/mapping-api

List all companies in a specific sector.

**Path Parameters:**
- `sector` (required): Industry sector name (e.g. Technology, Healthcare, Finance)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/mapping-api

List all companies in a specific industry.

**Path Parameters:**
- `industry` (required): Industry classification (e.g. Software, Biotechnology)

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/mapping-api

Download the complete CIK-to-ticker mapping as a JSON file. Updated daily 1:00-5:00 AM.

**Other bulk mapping endpoints:**
- `/bulk/mapping/cik-to-cusip`
- `/bulk/mapping/ticker-to-cik`
- `/bulk/mapping/ticker-to-cusip`
- `/bulk/mapping/cusip-to-cik`
- `/bulk/mapping/cusip-to-ticker`

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/mapping-api

Get EDGAR entity details by CIK number.

**Required Parameters:**
- `cik` (string): Central Index Key

**Response Fields:** cik, name, businessAddress, mailingAddress, stateOfIncorporation, phone, irsNo, sic, sicLabel, cfOffice, fiscalYearEnd, filerCategory, auditorName, auditorFirmId, formTypes

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/edgar-entities-api

Search the EDGAR entities database with custom queries.

**Required Parameters:**
- `query` (string): Lucene query expression

**Optional Parameters:**
- `from` (integer): Pagination offset (default: 0, max: 10000)
- `size` (integer): Results per page (default: 50, max: 50)
- `sort` (array): Sort order

**Docs:** https://sec-api.io/docs/edgar-entities-api

item.description: Map between CIK, CUSIP, ticker, company name, exchange, sector, and industry. Includes bulk mapping downloads and EDGAR entity database search.

Company CIK. Auto-set by Filing Query API or Mapping endpoints.
Company CUSIP. Auto-set by Mapping endpoints.
